name: AI Lead Qualification — HubSpot Triggered (Full Loop)

nodes.name: HubSpot — New Contact
nodes.notes: Fires whenever a new contact is created in HubSpot — by a rep, form submission, import, or API.

nodes.name: HubSpot — Get Contact Details
nodes.notes: Fetch full contact details. The trigger only sends the object ID — we need email, name, company, etc.

nodes.name: Already Scored?
nodes.notes: Skip contacts that already have an AI score — prevents re-processing on updates.

nodes.name: Extract Lead Data
nodes.notes: Transforms HubSpot contact properties into the lead format our Vercel API expects.

nodes.name: Vercel — Create Lead
nodes.notes: POST to Vercel API to create the lead in Supabase.

nodes.name: Vercel — Process Pipeline
nodes.notes: POST to Vercel API to run enrichment → AI → scoring. This is the heavy call (15-30s).

nodes.name: Vercel — Fetch Scored Lead
nodes.notes: Fetch the fully scored lead back from Supabase via Vercel API.

nodes.name: Build Update Payloads
nodes.notes: Transforms the scored lead data into payloads for HubSpot update and Slack messages.

nodes.name: HubSpot — Update Contact Scores
nodes.notes: Writes AI scores, signals, and qualification decision back to the HubSpot contact.

nodes.name: Route Slack by Decision
nodes.notes: Routes to different Slack channels based on qualification decision.

nodes.name: Has Email?
nodes.notes: Skip contacts without email — can't enrich without an identifier.
